events.title: Burglary — 14 Maple Heights Dr
events.summary: Rear slider pried, doorbell cam obscured, electronics + small safe taken. Witness: dark blue sedan, partial plate 8K.

events.title: Burglary — 902 Riverside Lane
events.summary: Same MO in a different county. 8mm left-nick tool signature. Witness: dark blue sedan. No shared records system with Maple Heights.

events.title: Burglary — 31 Maple Heights Ct
events.summary: Third job, same signature. Cam spray missed the lens edge → 4-sec clip caught the plate.

events.title: Arrest — Daniel R. Marsh
events.summary: Plate → owner. Pry bar recovered matches 8mm + left nick across all three cases. Confession. ~23 months after the first burglary.
